headline: GLJ Research Upgrades First Solar (FSLR) to Buy
summary: First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ:FSLR) is one of the 10 Best Debt-Free S&P 500 Stocks to Buy Now. On May 27, 2026, GLJ Research analyst Gordon Johnson upgraded First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ:FSLR) to Buy from Hold with a price target of $315, up from $207.82. Johnson cited resolved cancellation risk and the launch of the company’s […]
